MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JULIA HOER, PA, LORI EPPERSON, NP and PAUL JOHNSON, M.D.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Defendants' "motion to change venue, pursuant to stipulation" is granted. Per the stipulation, plaintiff shall pay the transfer costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
